creator: dgeo@centrale-med.fr
text:
changes in bsd.database.mk from ports/174660 made databases/mariadb-* break.

This patch to bsd.database.mk and databases/mariadb-server should let it work again

Fix: patch attached (thanks to Jeff Wheelhouse)

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: try to compile anything dependent on mariadb-client
